title: bellevalia sartoriana subsp. pharmacusana
intro: Bellevalia sartoriana subsp. pharmacusana is a subspecies of the Bellevalia sartoriana plant, a type of ornamental and medicinal bulbous perennial plant native to the Balkan Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Bellevalia sartoriana subsp. pharmacusana include relief from bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
